name: python3-libvmdk
title: python3-libvmdk
summary: VMWare Virtual Disk format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
VMWare Virtual Disk format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libvmdk is a library to access the VMware Virtual Disk (VMDK) format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libvmdk.
